name: Captrix editor core flow
description: Simple end-to-end smoke flow for the Captrix landing page, editor shell, presets, platform controls, AI guard, and export guard.

planSteps.description: The page shows Captions that make clips land and data-testid=landing-open-studio.

The page shows Captrix AI, data-testid=project-status, data-testid=video-stage, data-testid=video-input, data-testid=generate-captions, data-testid=caption-size, data-testid=caption-timeline-scroll, and data-testid=export-kit.
The page shows Shorts, Meme Stack, Middle, and 22px.
data-testid=video-stage remains visible and the platform text updates without a page reload.
Click data-testid=generate-captions without uploading a video.
The page says a loaded clip is needed.
The page says a valid clip is required before exporting.
